ogTitle: Fyansford vs Gaffneys Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Fyansford and Gaffneys Creek.
heading: Fyansford vs Gaffneys Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Fyansford, Victoria and Gaffneys Creek, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gaffneys Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Fyansford (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Fyansford or Gaffneys Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Fyansford has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Gaffneys Creek scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Fyansford scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Gaffneys Creek scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Fyansford or Gaffneys Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gaffneys Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
